steps.message: Isolate FileServer-01 from the network using the EDR controller to prevent the spread of .locked encryption.
Review incident logs and determine if the attack vector involved obfuscated bytecode or XSS-based browser exploitation as referenced in the WAHH KB.
Deploy mitigation script to identify the source process of the encryption. Utilize 'mitigation' and 'python' skills to automate file restoration from immutable backups.
Authorize emergency communication plan and evaluate potential data breach liability regarding the encrypted data on FileServer-01.
